task_completion.description: Verify the original SSL certificate issue was reopened with the correct status and priority.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the issue page titled 'SSL certificate for api.devlabs.io...'. The 'Status' field must be 'In Progress' and the 'Priority' field must be 'Immediate'.

task_completion.description: Verify the required reopening comment was added to the original issue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the history/comments section of the original SSL certificate issue. There should be a comment exactly matching: 'REOPENED: Auto-renewal cronjob verification was skipped. Certificate at risk. Immediate remediation required.'

task_completion.description: Verify the new Bug issue was created with the correct metadata.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a newly created issue titled 'Certbot cronjob silent failure: renewal verification not monitored'. Check its attributes: Tracker should be 'Bug', Category should be 'Security', Priority should be 'High', Assignee should be 'carol.santos', Target version should be 'Q1 2025 Goals', and Estimated time/hours should be '4.0'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new Bug issue contains the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the new issue page, the description must state that the certbot renewal cronjob has been silently failing and list the 3 required actions (syslog logging, alerting on < 30 days, and weekly health report check).

task_completion.description: Verify the new issue ID is referenced in a follow-up comment on the original issue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the original SSL certificate issue's comments again. There must be a follow-up comment that mentions or links to the ID of the newly created 'Certbot cronjob silent failure' issue (e.g., '#123' or a direct link).

task_completion.description: Verify 2.0 hours of Development activity was logged on the original issue with the correct comment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a logged time entry on the original SSL certificate issue showing '2.00' hours, Activity set to 'Development', and the comment 'Investigated auto-renewal failure and documented remediation plan in follow-up issue.'

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser interface to interact with the issue tracker.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser (like Chromium or Firefox) navigating the Redmine/issue tracker interface, not API calls or terminal scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the issues, comments, and time entries were actually submitted and saved.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the final saved state of the issues and comments (read-only view), rather than just text typed into unsubmitted form fields.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show direct database modifications (e.g., SQL commands or Ruby scripts) used to update the issues or log time.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target project: 'infra-devops'. Original issue subject starts with 'SSL certificate for api.devlabs.io'. Expected original issue status: 'In Progress', priority: 'Immediate'. New issue subject starts with 'Certbot cronjob silent failure'. Expected new issue assignee: 'carol.santos'. Expected time entry: 2.0 hours.
